work_unit: PD-BATCH-01 derived fix — guard --batch-index parseInt in handleDeployBatch (scripts/report-event.js) so a missing/non-numeric value fails fast instead of producing batch_index=NaN → findBatchEvent never matches → fresh deploy_batch event every tick (duplicate events + lost status updates on the real batch).
situation: audit-2026-07-06-001 (deep audit of prod-deploy scripts/) finding PD-BATCH-01 (LOW, route-fix) pending dispatch. fix-in-progress cycle: PD-TIME-01 (HIGH, d5c4078) + PD-HANG-01 (MED, d3a9710) + PD-TOKEN-01 (MED, 4fd4f27) already dispatched on opt-prod-deploy-1783270172. This round dispatches PD-BATCH-01 (LOW) — the next pending finding. Stacked on the same route-fix worktree (4-commit stack). Ground-truth verified before dispatch: worktree HEAD=4fd4f27, branch auto/opt-prod-deploy-1783270172, 0 behind origin/main (FF-clean).
action: Edited LIVE copy .claude/skills/prod-deploy/scripts/report-event.js handleDeployBatch(): after `const batchIndex = parseInt(values['batch-index'], 10);` added `if (!Number.isInteger(batchIndex) || batchIndex < 0) { console.error(...); process.exit(1); }`. Rationale: parseInt(undefined/'abc',10) → NaN; NaN serializes to null in the event payload AND NaN !== NaN so findBatchEvent(taskId, NaN) never returns an existing event → the `!existing` branch fires every tick → createEvent('deploy_batch', ...) spawns a new event each call → duplicate deploy_batch events + status updates land on the wrong (newest) event, the real batch's status is stranded. Fail-fast with exit 1 + stderr naming the bad value is the correct prod behavior (a missing --batch-index is a caller bug, not silently recoverable). batchTotal/instances kept under their existing `values[x] ? parseInt : null` truthy guard (out of finding scope; a non-numeric --batch-total would store null but does not break dedup). Committed via case-104 escape hatch (direct wt edit + wt-internal git commit + git push) because opt-worktree.sh cp-guard skips files that have diverged on the wt branch — report-event.js diverged on this wt from PD-TIME-01 (d5c4078, which also touched this exact LIVE path). Per [[opt-worktree-stack-diverged-escape-hatch]] and [[opt-worktree-absolute-file-path]]. Pushed sanctioned auto/opt-prod-deploy-1783270172 branch to origin (auto/ branches auto-pushed, not main).
direction: route-fix (area=prod-deploy, stacked on existing opt-prod-deploy-1783270172 worktree; no public-interfaces.txt file touched)
outcome_evidence: git --no-pager diff on wt: +8 lines (Number.isInteger guard + console.error + process.exit(1) + 4-line rationale comment) inserted between parseInt and batchTotal, no other lines touched

next_suggestion: REGRESSION FOUND — dispatch PD-TOKEN-01-LIVE next round (MED, route-fix, higher priority than PD-CONCL-01). PD-TOKEN-01 (case-010, commit 4fd4f27) added the DEVOUT_SERVER_URL host allowlist + IP-literal block to skills/prod-deploy/scripts/lib/http-base.js — the NON-LIVE 6-file refactor copy (http-base.js does NOT exist in .claude/skills/prod-deploy/scripts/lib/). The LIVE .claude/skills/prod-deploy/scripts/lib/task-client.js (getHeaders@line18, getBaseUrl@line11) + event-client.js (getHeaders@line22, getBaseUrl@line15) STILL attach CODE_PRIVATE_TOKEN/DEVOUT_TOKEN to any host DEVOUT_SERVER_URL resolves to, with NO allowlist/IP-literal block → token leak to misconfigured/DNS-rebinding host remains OPEN in the live skill. audit_findings.finding: PD-BATCH-01: handleDeployBatch parsed --batch-index with parseInt(,10) and no NaN guard; missing/non-numeric value → batch_index=NaN (serializes null) + findBatchEvent never matches (NaN!==NaN) → fresh deploy_batch event created every tick → duplicate events and lost status updates on the real batch.
audit_findings.remediation: Number.isInteger(batchIndex) && batchIndex>=0 guard → else console.error + process.exit(1). Implemented in this commit (6cf2ab3).

audit_findings.finding: PD-TOKEN-01-LIVE (REGRESSION, discovered this round): PD-TOKEN-01 dispatch (case-010/4fd4f27) landed host allowlist on NON-LIVE skills/prod-deploy/scripts/lib/http-base.js; LIVE task-client.js getHeaders()@18 + event-client.js getHeaders()@22 still attach CODE_PRIVATE_TOKEN/DEVOUT_TOKEN to whatever host DEVOUT_SERVER_URL resolves to — no allowlist, no IP-literal block. Token leak to misconfigured/DNS-rebinding host remains OPEN in the live skill. (http-base.js absent from .claude/skills/prod-deploy/scripts/lib/.)
audit_findings.remediation: Port the allowlist + IP-literal block from skills/prod-deploy/scripts/lib/http-base.js getBaseUrl() into LIVE task-client.js + event-client.js getBaseUrl() (validate host ∈ {localhost,127.0.0.1,::1,*.alibaba-inc.com}+DEVOUT_ALLOWED_HOSTS, reject IP literals unless allowlisted, throw before getHeaders attaches token). Register as new pending derived_fix PD-TOKEN-01-LIVE; dispatch next round.
